other_observers: Jeannie Mitchell , Jackie Heyda; Yes , I was original observer
specific_location: Platte Ranch , off CO 9 , half way between Hartsel and Fairplay .
description: Flycatcher with dark brown rounded head , dark tail , pale underparts with light gray wash on upper breast , no wing bars , no eye ring , wagged its tail occasionally .Behaviors: Spent a lot of time investigating the eves of a derilict ranch building or perched on a fencepost and sallying out to catch insects.Call: Hard chip. Did not hear the classic "phoebe call "Plumage: adult
